productName: Green Reaper - Live Resin Cart - Bacio Gelato - 1g
description: This hybrid cartridge loads Bacio Gelato into a sleek 510-thread pen for clean, convenient draws — premium oil, precise hits, zero hassle. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of vanilla, berry, and mint, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
